text:

Log:
  - Add 2 patches, which avoid crashes:
   * When renaming files / folders [1] (we use the official patch)
   * When reloading target file after move
  - Bump PORTREVISION

  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann [1] (obtained from Slackware repository)
